p1_system_boot: >>> SYSTEM INITIALIZED... Hero of Aethermoor detected. Level 50. All parameters nominal.
p1_aria_status: All party members in optimal condition. Nihilus' portal lies directly ahead.
p1_aria_ready: This time we end it. For good. Nihilus will fall.
p1_luna_oath: I'll bring you all home. I promise.
p1_kael_joke: If this goes sideways... it was an honor robbing you blind!
p1_aldric_plan: The plan is simple: We break through the shadow wall and confront Nihilus directly.
p1_system_scout_detected: >>> CONTACT: Shadow scout at position 7-Gamma. Low threat level. Neutralization recommended.
p1_kael_scout_spotted: Just a single scout. We'll handle this on the way — good warm-up!
p1_aria_first_blood: Clean. If only all enemies were that easy...
p1_protag_warmup: That was just the beginning. Save your strength for what's coming.
p1_system_night: >>> Camp established. Nihilus' portal energy: stable. Recommendation: Rest before battle.
p1_aria_memory: Remember our first adventure? You couldn't even hold a sword properly.
p1_protag_response: And you never gave up on me. I'll never forget that.
p1_aria_smile: This time, I'll be the one protecting you. Even if you don't need it anymore.
p1_aldric_studying: No, no... these runes must be perfectly aligned. One mistake and...
p1_aria_notices: Aldric? What are you studying? That looks like... forbidden time magic.
p1_aldric_confession: There's something you should know... before we go into battle. The truth about my past with Nihilus.
p1_choice_forgive: Everyone deserves a second chance. Tell us everything.
p1_choice_angry: You've been lying to us this whole time?!
p1_protag_forgive: Whatever happened - you're here today, by our side. That's what matters.
p1_aldric_grateful: I... thank you. You truly are different from the other heroes.
p1_protag_angry: How could you keep this from us? After everything we've been through!
p1_aria_mediate: Both of you, calm down. We can sort this out after the fight. Right now we need each other.
p1_aria_understand: Sometimes actions speak louder than words. Let's move on.
p1_kael_story: Hey, does anyone remember the Dragonfell heist? Three guards, a cake, and one very angry mayor!
p1_kael_hands: You know... my hands stopped shaking a long time ago. But tonight... tonight they're shaking again.
p1_protag_kael_comfort: You're the bravest coward I know, Kael. And I'm glad you're here.
p1_luna_promise: When tomorrow is over, we'll go back to Eldenrath. I'll cook the feast I've been promising you for months.
p1_aria_worried: Luna... you know the odds are...
p1_luna_smile: I know. But as long as I breathe, I heal. That's my promise.
p1_system_dawn: >>> Dawn. All systems ready. Nihilus' portal activity: CRITICAL. It's time.
p1_protag_ready: No more speeches. Today decides everything.
p1_system_warning: >>> WARNING: Anomalous energy signature detected. Nihilus' power exceeds all previous measurements.
p1_protag_lets_go: Then it's time. For Aethermoor. For everyone we've lost.
